category_sources: source_facts.description says it visualizes differences between two PDF files; official GitHub README describes pdf-diff as a PDF difference visualization tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pdf-diff; official GitHub repository heading is serhack/pdf-diff.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains requirements and usage examples for pdf-diff.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/serhack/pdf-diff; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists pdf-diff; source_facts.description and official README describe PDF visual diff behavior; GitHub language metadata shows Go.
